title: Touchup rm and container man pages
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Clarifies what 'buildah rm --all' does and adds some examples to the containers page.

comments.body:
Travis error is only in golang 1.7 and looks like a build environment issue.  

```
$ sudo apt-get -qq install bats btrfs-tools git libapparmor-dev libdevmapper-dev libglib2.0-dev libgpgme11-dev libselinux1-dev
E: Unable to locate package bats
The command "sudo apt-get -qq install bats btrfs-tools git libapparmor-dev libdevmapper-dev libglib2.0-dev libgpgme11-dev libselinux1-dev" failed and exited with 100 during .
```
I think they should be truncated by default.  This is what podman and docker do, don't see a real reason why buildah should be different.
But that should be fixed in a different PR.

:pushpin: Commit a861b1b has been approved by `rhatdan`
